programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: IEB+ Argentina Open (250) Final
programme.desc: The IEB+ Argentina Open is a professional tennis tournament in Buenos Aires, held annually on clay courts at the Buenos Aires Lawn Tennis Club. It's a key stop in the South American "Golden Swing," showcasing both established stars and rising talent.

programme.title: Qatar TotalEnergies Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Khalifa International Tennis and Squash Complex in Doha, Qatar.

programme.title: Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Day 5 Session 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually at the Foro Italico in Rome, Italy. Since its inception in 1930, the Italian Open has become one of the most prestigious clay-court tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: A look back at the 41st edition of the second event of the "Sunshine Double" from the hardcourts at the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: UCI Asia Tour - Tour of Hainan Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris
programme.desc: The Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris is one of the world's largest and most popular road races, featuring over 50,000 participants from 110 countries. The race course starts on the Champs-Élysées and finishes near Avenue Foch.

programme.title: Peace the Polar Bear
programme.desc: Zookeeper Takaichi Atsuhiro has cared for a polar bear named Peace since she was a cub, including through her battle with epilepsy - We take a look at the ups and downs of their 25 years together.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: The Sanriku Coast was the area hit hardest by the massive earthquake and tsunami of 2011 - its restored communities are rediscovering their local traditions and the unique beauty of this landscape.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programmes from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Japan's exciting music scene, with pop, rock, traditional, live performances, artist interviews, all the latest news, video releases and more!

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Konnyaku is an important element of Japanese cuisine - it offers various health benefits and is drawing international attention. We learn about the many uses of this surprising superfood.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Cats show off their climbing skills at a spot overlooking the sea, we meet a cat who takes us to a field of daffodils on the island of Mushima, and some other cats tease Iwago by hiding among flowers.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kirikane - the beauty of gossamer gold leaf craftsmanship. Dive deep into the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical and effective workplace expressions, understand business culture, and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Miyoshi Chika preserves the art of sakiori - the ancestral wisdom that even small scraps of fabric should never go to waste - as she weaves strips of old cloth into colourful items with modern appeal.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: Japanese Christians went into hiding after Christianity was outlawed in Japan during the 17th century - explore the ruins where some made their last stand and the beautiful Oura Cathedral.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with pianist Mine Kawakami - for which she plays exclusive pieces - helps you experience each season.

programme.desc: As interest in sumo grows worldwide, daily coverage of the highlights of all 6 annual tournaments in Japan is about to take off on NHK World TV.

programme.desc: 'Sumopedia' enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past - the rules may be simple, but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: A spotlight on our diverse international community as we report on issues, speak to those involved, and get a fresh look at what it's like to live in Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: This episode of a series on COP30 in Brazil examines agroforestry, a combination of agriculture and forestry promoted by scientists as a potential method of regenerating rainforests.

programme.desc: As a series in Culture Crossroads, Bosai Be Prepared provides practical knowledge to save life from natural disaster. Today, we learn what happens when a volcano erupts and how we should be prepared.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World-Japan
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Dive in Tokyo
programme.desc: Tokyo: a place where both tradition and the latest trends coexist. Join us on a journey to historic old towns and encounter many fun surprises along the way!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This programme visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: According to a report in the Lancet, age-related hearing loss is a risk factor for dementia - a unique rehabilitation programme in Japan is helping people recognise words while wearing hearing aids.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programmes from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The Kii Mountains are home to dynamic landscapes formed by a volcanic eruption 14 million years ago. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show the area's rock formations and rich ecosystem.

programme.title: Junoon
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Ghar Ki Laxmi
programme.desc: The story of a prisoner on Death row fighting his wrongful conviction in the backdrop of Chess.

programme.title: Shakuntala Devi: A Human Computer
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: 一乐也
programme.desc: 由三个民初故事串联而成的喜剧小品，许冠文一人分饰多角，其中包括剃头学徒：有一街坊中风而死，许代师傅守灵，为打发时间与众人在灵堂玩起「麻雀耍乐」，怎料尸体突然触电翻生！

programme.title: 鬼马神偷
programme.desc: 鲁俊谷、张权、于洋三人乃沙煲兄弟，三人合力获得宝物「双面神」，不料却给胡起尾注，将三人毒杀，独吞「双面神」。刘永、梁家仁及梁韵蕊是他们的后人，在不打不相识之下重逢，为了完成亡父的遗志，三人齐心向胡偷回宝物。韵蕊早已混入胡家中，色诱胡之子，作为内应查出「双面神」之收藏地点。永与家仁则扮鬼扮马，偷天换日，最后偷得双面神！

programme.title: 陆阿采与黄飞鸿
programme.desc: 年轻的黄飞鸿誓要证明自己有能力，可以成为父亲的习武师傅陆阿采的徒弟。虽然他在一次比武中落败，但黄飞鸿对武学的热诚终于感动了陆阿采，并得偿所愿拜他为师。

programme.title: 玉女亲情
programme.desc: 故事讲述张爱珠无意得知自己是孤儿，故往找生母。生母茱莉与流氓刘老四同居，老四心起歪念，竟欲非礼爱珠，茱莉救了女儿，却被老四误杀。爱珠逃回养父母家，始深深体会到养父母对她的爱。

programme.title: 五虎屠龙
programme.desc: 高氏五兄弟，少时家遭巨变，流离失散。长大后，各有际遇，不知杀父仇人就是无恶不作的腾龙庄主。但五兄弟各自均不满腾龙庄欺凌弱小之所作所为，并誓要除魔。当五兄弟重逢后，他们一起努力练功，准备与腾龙庄庄主及其帮会一战。

programme.title: 故都春梦
programme.desc: 故事源自脍炙人口的《啼笑因缘》，内容描述民国初年，富家子范嘉恕恋上歌女岑逢仙，同时又唯卖艺少女官绣珠及貌似岑的财政厅长女儿贺莉霞所迷恋。张大帅垂涎岑，更奸污了她。嘉恕后得绣珠相助，才从大帅手中救回爱人。

programme.title: 隐身女侠
programme.desc: 年轻女剑客服下奶奶研制的隐身药后，变成白天隐形晚上现身的怪人。她无意中捣乱了黑道首领女儿的婚事，惹来连番追杀。女剑客最后如何脱险？

programme.title: 花团锦簇
programme.desc: 时装设计师史马哥向叶德梅征求她对自己作品的意见，梅却随意提出批评，这让马哥感到非常不满。一天，梅准备出席一场盛大的宴会，于是找马哥为她设计礼服，不料他为报复故意设计了一件小丑装，让梅颜面尽失。最终，史马哥却很内疚并向梅道歉，两人冰释前嫌，并坠入爱河。

programme.title: 冲霄楼
programme.desc: 改编自侠义小说《七侠五义》，人物繁多，情节多变，难得张彻处理得有条不紊，角色性格分明。故事讲述襄阳王在王府中，建造的冲霄楼机关密布，又广招花蝴蝶花冲、神手大圣邓车和小诸葛沈仲元等江湖侠士加盟，伺机造反。包公得悉襄阳王叛迹，乃命门生颜春敏前往调查。

programme.title: 寒烟翠
programme.desc: 陈咏薇的父母准备离异，于是把她送到章家暂住。章家长子凌霄、次子凌风、三女凌云和年轻画家余亚南都对咏薇很好，使她在章家农场度过了难忘的暑假。

programme.title: 金印仇
programme.desc: 戴天仇自幼习武，矢志为父报仇。彼时其杀父仇人，到处为非作歹。戴上路途中遇上女扮男装的吴小燕，并突遭多名帮会中人毒打，吴遂求父允其把戴带返家中养伤。戴竟因此得以混入仇人地盘，希望可乘机报仇...

programme.title: 春暖花开
programme.desc: 故事描述，陈太太有女洁玉及美玉，洁玉已工作，美玉仍求学。适逢陈家有空房出租，少奇来租，一谈即合；洁玉三个姐姐，皆与租客结婚，所以洁玉表姐赵静兰之母决仿效陈家租房选婿。未几，一医科学生欣农来租房，赵母见他是理想快婿，忙出租。原来少奇与欣农是同学，少奇老成寡言，被洁玉、美玉视为怪人，欣农则只顾谈恋爱...

programme.title: 唐山五虎
programme.desc: 一位功夫师傅与三位门徒被恶霸欺凌，师徒俱败于他拳下。三徒悲愤填膺，分别寻师学艺。半年后，恶霸寿辰之日，三徒连袂回归，誓要与恶霸一较高下！

programme.desc: When a young girl is found dead with a doll that is believed to have been left as a totem, Benson and Stabler team up with Captain Jackson, a psychologist who assisted them with a recent case, to investigate her murder.

programme.title: The Numbers Game
programme.desc: Guest star Mai Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss bank account by convincing him World War III has started.

programme.title: Part 4
programme.desc: As pandemonium grips Salem's Lot, Ben Mears convinces a few of the townsfolk of the grim reality that vampires have invaded the town, are breeding more, and must be stopped.

programme.title: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When Lynn encourages ALF to draw up his family tree, he discovers that his parents were married before he was born--a disgrace on his native planet, Melmac.

programme.title: Night Fears
programme.desc: A policeman-turned-professor challenges Jessica (Angela Lansbury) to solve a series of campus muggings that soon escalates to murder.

programme.title: Unauthorised Obituary
programme.desc: Jessica aids an old friend who is suspected of killing an author who had planned to write an unauthorized biography of his famous wife.

programme.desc: Sheriff Metzger asks Jessica to help him keep his perspective when his troublesome younger brother is suspected of murdering his employer.

programme.title: Lines Of Excellence
programme.desc: Jessica accidentally discovers a case of computer tapping which leads to murder when she trades in her manual typewriter for a computer.

programme.title: Samantha's Old Man

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: Reparations
programme.desc: Jonah Dekker comes to NYC from L.A. to defend his cousin who has been accused of rape. Meanwhile, ADA Casey Novak returns to help Benson and Stabler with the case.

programme.title: 环球交叉点
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 看东方
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 午间30分
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 东方新闻
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 看不见的他们
programme.desc: 一场车祸后，林月家里怪事连连。全身冰冷的姐姐在镜子里看不见家人的身影，黑夜里爸爸窥探的双眼，和每天凌晨阁楼传来的弹珠声。林月循声而上去寻找真相，却在打开阁楼的门后，发现里面紧锁的是自己的遗像...

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 画魔人
programme.desc: 若为和两位闺蜜回到她儿时居住的房子，重遇一直住在那儿的表哥。他们本打算一起散散心，却频频遭遇灵异事件的侵袭，最后更变成一场惊心动魄之旅，有让人意想不到的结局。

programme.title: 武松斗杀西门庆
programme.desc: 武松因发现他的嫂子潘金莲与富家子弟西门庆有染，而被西门庆设计将他流放一年，在此期间，他的哥哥武大郎不幸被杀并火化下葬。武松回家后，告上公堂，谁知县令三言两语打回状子，潦草结案。武松最终能否为哥哥报仇？

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 六耳猕猴
programme.desc: 生命之树被烧毁后，世间陷入一片混沌。为拯救苍生，孙悟空决定回到过去，帮助生命之树复活。因为失去了金箍棒，孙悟空力量时有时无，只得找回儿时的自己，一同前往寻找时间之力。不料，六耳猕猴却想据为己有，两人就此爆发激战。

programme.title: 我爱神仙遮
programme.desc: 推土车司机阿成，在工作时忽遇地陷而堕入一地下古庙，无意中成为油纸伞妖的主人。她更将自己现身的秘密及超凡的法力告知阿成。地盘工目凡叔嗜赌，欠下恶少高利贷，恶少垂涎凡叔之女美色，要凡叔以女还债；阿成得悉后请伞妖戏弄恶少，并暗助凡叔在赌场获胜，清还债项。惟此神伞之秘密却被恶少发现...

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 雪儿
programme.desc: 舞蹈教师雪儿年轻貌美，被富商戴家乐力追，但她却喜欢青年艺术家阿化，并与他同居。戴家乐心有不甘，设计让雪儿对他改观，更利诱阿化离开雪儿！

programme.title: 靓女差馆
programme.desc: 雷女警长率领的港岛东刑事侦缉组的组员全是女警，因此有「靓女差馆」之称。警员生啤和沙爹对各女警一见难忘，遂主动申请调职到靓女差馆，意图接近众女并展开追求。这时，靓女差馆收到炸弹恐吓，她们最后能化解危机吗？

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Volleybull! / Diferente es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: Gaucho Games / Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games! // Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Pups Save a Goldrush / Pups Save the Paw Patroller
programme.desc: When a grizzled old prospector discovers gold in Adventure Bay, it's a bona fide, dog gone, gold rush! // When Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew try to steal the Paw Patroller, the chase becomes a rescue!

programme.title: Pups Save the Soccer Game / Pups Save a Lucky Collar
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol are called in to play. // The Paw Patrol must work as a team to overcome some dirty tricks by Mayor Humdinger and pull out a victory!

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Maker
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Tool Truck Blaze
programme.desc: When three construction emergencies break out all over town, Blaze must save the day by becoming: Tool Truck Blaze! With a toolbox full of amazing tools, Blaze is ready to hammer, drill and saw through any obstacle in his way! Tool Truck Power!

programme.title: The Snow, Sea, Sky, Race
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher face off in an off-road showdown: the Snow, Sea, Sky Race! The trucks must speed through the snow, swim through the sea, and soar to a finish line in the sky! Will Blaze win the trophy? Or will Crusher be the all-terrain champion?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: Pups Save the Baby Space Rocks / Pups Save the Eddies and Emmys
programme.desc: When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe. // A 3-D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3-D reproductions of themselves and play pranks all over Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Charger Visits the Pups / Pups Save a Shiny Ride
programme.desc: Rubble's cousin, Charger, visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's cafe. // Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage a "Shinest Ride Contest", so it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the day.

programme.title: The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: Ratoncito Perez
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth.

programme.title: Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Dressing Up
programme.desc: Peppa and George make everyone laugh when they dress up as Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig.

programme.title: New Shoes
programme.desc: Peppa loses her shoes, but she gets new red ones. Now she is so happy in them, that she refuses to take them off.

programme.title: The School Fete
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fair, and do lots of stuff while they're there. Peppa and her friends get their faces painted as tigers.

programme.title: Mummy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Mummy Pig's birthday, and Peppa, George and Daddy Pig are planning a surprise.

programme.title: The Royal Fairy Picnic / Gaston the Ladybird
programme.desc: Holly invites Ben on the annual Royal Fairy Picnic. King Thistle hopes there won't be a repeat of last year's jelly flood. // Holly and Ben try to cheer up Gaston by tidying his cave. But Gaston liked his cave just as it was, all messy and untidy.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: The Island of Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Somewhere, on The Island of Lost Treasure, there are incredible riches just waiting to be discovered. And Blaze and Darington are determined to be the first to find them!

programme.title: Babysitting Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping their friend Stripes look after some baby animals, when the little critters accidentally float away on big bubbles. Now, it's up to these three babysitters to find their adorable animal friends and save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus / The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Bear / Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
programme.desc: The pups need to get a sleepwalking bear back home before he wakes up. // Daring Danny X takes his horse off the trail and ends up on a wild ride.

programme.title: Pups Save the Land Pirates / Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and got lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates. // Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Friendaversary Adventure / Swiper's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: Stars
programme.desc: It is night time and the sky is full of stars. Mummy and Daddy Pig let Peppa and George put their coats on and they go outside to look at the stars. The stars look very tiny, but when Peppa and George look through a telescope the stars look bigger.

programme.title: Work and Play
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a store. But they quickly get tired of it.

programme.title: The Rainbow
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: Pedro's Cough

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United's star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it's not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he's faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: With nearly 500 Premier League games to his name, and tenth all time in goals scored, Jermain Defoe has left an indelible mark on the Premier League. PL Moments sits down with the former West Ham, Spurs, Portsmouth, Sunderland and Bournemouth striker to look back at the goals and the games that defined his career. Defoe reflects on his childhood, road to the Premier League, his international career as well as his work off the pitch.

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营

programme.title: Tashkent, Uzbekistan
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite visits the iconic city, Tashkent, and gets firsthand experience of its culture, food and people.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi explores the magnificent monuments and architecturally striking attractions of Helsinki.

programme.title: Gotland Tales
programme.desc: Robbie steps into a fairytale on the island of Gotland - medieval walls, mysterious lagoons, and rugged beauty collide in this windswept wonderland.

programme.title: Coimbra, Portugal
programme.desc: From an ancient monastery and center of learning to one of the world’s oldest universities, welcome to Coimbra, Portugal’s university town.

programme.title: Ciudad de México, Mexico.
programme.desc: Enter Charlie Rubio: a bona fide Mexican, who is here to reveal all the wonderful things that make Mexico his favorite place in the world.

programme.title: Wild Atlantic Way 3, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex continues his journey on Wild Atlantic Way and is in Kinsale. Starting with a heritage walk and ending with exploring the Kinnegar Brewery.

programme.title: The Sculptures of Khajuraho, India
programme.desc: The Khajuraho group of temples have awed generations with their architectural brilliance, intricate carvings and their famous erotic sculptures.

programme.title: Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to the Arctic Circle, where she meets Santa Claus in his office. She also tries midnight sun floating.

programme.title: Gothenburg Drift
programme.desc: Crayfish safaris, floating saunas, and fika breaks galore - Robbie slows it down on Sweden’s effortlessly cool west coast.

programme.title: Porto, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek soaks in the old-world atmosphere of Porto and sets out to sample the city’s famous port wine.

programme.title: Bangkok
programme.desc: From meeting the "Queen of Bangkok Street Food" to eating Pad Thai at the place where it was born, Emeline lives a foodie’s dream in Bangkok.

programme.title: Cork, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex explores Cork, starting with Fota Wildlife Park and then Blarney castle.

programme.title: Legacy of the Mughal Empire in Agra, India
programme.desc: The monuments of Agra and Fatehpur Sikri tell stories of the Mughal opulence and their love for the finer things in life.

programme.title: Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: In Rovaniemi, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits a husky farm, tries fishing with a local and participates in a curious Finnish tradition.

programme.title: Trollhättan Trails
programme.desc: From epic waterfalls to hidden street art and one last party in Gothenburg - Robbie’s Swedish story ends with a cinematic splash.

programme.title: Douro Valley Portugal
programme.desc: Driek visits the vineyards of Douro valley, one of the oldest demarcated wine regions in the world.

programme.title: Lampang
programme.desc: At an elephant conservation centre in Lampang, Emeline experiences the immense love that the Thai people feel for their national animal.

programme.title: Londonderry, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex visits Peace bridge and explores Ness County by visiting Mussenden temple. Later tries blow-karting.

programme.title: Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi bakes cookies with Santa’s helpers in Elves village, in Levi. She also rides river rapids on a car inner tube..

programme.title: Santorini Greece
programme.desc: With its sea-drowned caldera, black-sand beaches and crimson sunsets, Santorini is the archetypal Greek island fantasy.

programme.title: Maldives Top 5 Things To Do
programme.desc: Here’s your cheat sheet to the most unique water-based experiences in the Maldives like feeding stingrays.

programme.title: Amatra
programme.desc: Looking for a break from the chaos and stress of city life, Asmita decides to visit Haridwar, a place which she had last visited with her family.

programme.title: Chiang Rai
programme.desc: While exploring the extraordinary temples in Chiang Rai, Emeline begins to uncover the stories hidden in their fascinating architecture.

programme.title: Shangri La, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Through Finnish activities such as foraging and reindeer herding, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi learns about Sisu - the Finnish secret to happiness.

programme.title: Baa Atoll, Maldives
programme.desc: Kirsty Nichol pampers herself with the spa treatments, adventures and Thai cuisine offered by Dusit Thani resort on Baa Atoll in Maldives.

programme.title: River Rafting In India
programme.desc: We have got the ultimate guide to India’s best white-water rafting spots, whether you’re a rookie or a river-riding pro!

programme.title: Koh Tao

programme.title: Dean Cummings
programme.desc: Skiing icon Dean Cummings is on trial for the shooting death of Guillermo Arriola, a local New Mexican rancher who was only armed with a can of mace.

programme.title: Pocket Knife Killer Or Vulnerable Vacationer?
programme.desc: A day out on the river with friends ends in a deadly encounter when a man stabs five people with a pocket knife, following a terrifying confrontation.

programme.title: Killer Driver Or Medical Emergency?
programme.desc: A man falls asleep while driving and kills a construction worker on the road. Was he a reckless driver or an innocent man with an undiagnosed medical condition?

programme.title: Meet Up For Murder
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects before they strike again.

programme.title: Shannon Price
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.title: Dark Influences
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Mystery In Cuero
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas, bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide.

programme.title: Think Twice
programme.desc: In Mobile, a father of four is found dead inside a car after a mysterious crash, and detectives discover that his death was no accident.

programme.title: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: Afternoon Ambush
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Dog Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man makes a scene on a Miami Beach; a drunk driver finds a strange and dangerous place to relieve himself; and more!

programme.title: I Did It
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a Florida tourist decides to take a scenic car drive through the ocean; a fugitive fleeing from police hides in plain sight; and more!

programme.title: Kamryn Johnson
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: Murder On Mirror Lake
programme.desc: The husband and father of a murdered family attacks their killer in court; a judge has no patience for a foul-mouthed defendant; a convicted drunk driver begs the judge for mercy; and more.

programme.title: The Sorcerer From Hell
programme.desc: With the help of his three wives, an Indonesian witch doctor called Ahmad Suradji admitted to killing 42 women over a period of 11 years.

programme.title: Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 拜托ATM

programme.title: 少康战情室
programme.desc: 节目内容包含时事评论与当天的突发新闻议题，以赵少康为主持的政论节目。

programme.title: 地球黄金线

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: Lopez vs Let It Go
programme.desc: George joins a meditation group led by Carlos the Curandero, a spiritual healer whose mantra is "let it go," however, Mayan worries her dad is letting go of too much, including their living room furniture; a burnout threatens to move next door.

programme.title: Lopez vs Raider Nation
programme.desc: As part of Alcoholics Anonymous, George makes amends with everyone except Oscar, who seeks an apology at a football game, but a runin with Marshawn Lynch fumbles the plan; Mayan and Quinten try to spark Rosie's love life but end up getting burned.

programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling largescale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.
